sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75649" key="o)streiako/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀστρειακός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n75649.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the oyster</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σάρξ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
